Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,220.00; Declaration Of Andre Karchemsky
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC.'s Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,220.00.

Defendant Mercedes-Benz's motion to compel the deposition for plaintiff Shona Rabara and for monetary sanctions is granted as to the motion to compel and Ms. Rabara must pay reasonable monetary sanctions of $1,500 to Mercedes-Benz no later than April 18, 2025. If Ms. Rabara's deposition has not already occurred and has not been scheduled per the mutual agreement of the parties, Ms. Rabara's deposition must take place on April 18, 2025 or such other date as the parties mutually agree. Ms. Rabara's failure to timely provide available dates for her deposition lacked substantial justification. The requested amount of monetary sanctions is reduced to reflect the extreme simplicity of this motion.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
